verses.text: Waters rise out of the north, an overflowing flood; at the noise of the chariots men's hands fall feeble. The invader is unstoppable. God's judgment sweeps in like a torrent none can dam.
Waters rise out of the north, an overflowing flood; at the noise of the chariots men's hands fall feeble. The invader is unstoppable. God's judgment sweeps in like a torrent none can dam.
Waters rise out of the north, an overflowing flood; at the noise of the chariots men's hands fall feeble. The invader is unstoppable. God's judgment sweeps in like a torrent none can dam.
The day comes to spoil the Philistines and their allies; Gaza is shaved bald, Ashkelon cut off, in mourning. Their strength is gone. The proud cities of the coast lie low before the LORD.
The day comes to spoil the Philistines and their allies; Gaza is shaved bald, Ashkelon cut off, in mourning. Their strength is gone. The proud cities of the coast lie low before the LORD.

Men cry, 'O thou sword of the LORD, how long ere thou be quiet?' but it cannot rest while God has given it a charge. The sword obeys its Maker. Judgment continues until the purpose of God is fulfilled.
